DeathItemBomb.text: Exploded by a pretty dangerous weapon.

DeathItemTheKing.text: Was blown up by The King.
The King was a bit too nervous.

DeathItemController.text: Died while being controlled by a coworker.
Was trolled by someone using a special electronic device.
Was being moved by pure green electronic magic.

DeathItemControllerUnlucky.text: Exploded due to unlucky Controller usage.
Why did you tried to kill your friend?

DeathItemFakeAirhornExplosion.text: Exploded by using the Fake Airhorn.
This was not the real one...

DeathItemFakeAirhornLightning.text: Struck by lightning when using the Fake Airhorn.
Struck by the powers of Zeus.
Oh no, it was a fake item...

DeathItemJobApplication.text: Tried reading a dark paper from a forgotten facility.
Was not hired, is now jobless.

DeathItemHelmOfDomination.text: Was exploded by the Helm of Domination.
Got caught in the helmet's explosion.
Is now wearing the Helm of the deads.

DeathItemGazpachoDrunk.text: Drank the Gazpacho a bit too much.
Did not stand up after a sip of the spanish drink.
Was not able to take it anymore, died by tomatoes.

DeathItemGazpachoUnlucky.text: Drank the Gazpacho and blew up.
Tried to drink a hot tomato soup.

DeathItemSquareSteel.text: Tried to grab the Galvanized square steel at low health.
With great power comes great responsabilities, but not for you.
Crushed by the screws you borrowed from your aunt.
Tried to build a 0.1 square meter house and failed.

DeathItemFriendshipEnder.text: Died after using the Friendship Ender.
